testcase.name: test_04_soundboard_chat_basic
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_modules_iteration129.py:146: in test_04_soundboard_chat_basic pytest.fail(f"Soundboard failed with {response.status_code}") E Failed: Soundboard failed with 500

testcase.name: test_05_soundboard_multi_turn
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_modules_iteration129.py:193: in test_05_soundboard_multi_turn assert successful_turns >= 2, f"Only {successful_turns}/3 turns succeeded" E AssertionError: Only 0/3 turns succeeded E assert 0 >= 2

testcase.name: test_06_war_room_respond

failure.message: AssertionError: War Room response too short assert 0 > 30 + where 0 = len('')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_modules_iteration129.py:236: in test_06_war_room_respond assert len(answer) > 30, "War Room response too short" E AssertionError: War Room response too short E assert 0 > 30 E + where 0 = len('')
